## Summary

Describe what and why.

## Type Of Change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI/CD

## Validation

- [ ] npm run lint
- [ ] npm run typecheck
- [ ] npm run build
- [ ] Manual smoke test completed

## Checklist

- [ ] Follows branch naming convention (feature/_, hotfix/_)
- [ ] Targets develop (or main for hotfix)
- [ ] Includes related issue reference
- [ ] Documentation updated if behavior changed
